meanings.definition: an impression made from an etched plate
an etched plate made with the use of acid
making engraved or etched plates and printing designs from them

examples: He etched her image into the surface

meanings.definition: cause to stand out or be clearly defined or visible
examples: the leafless branches etched against the sky

meanings.definition: carve or cut into a block used for printing or print from such a block
carve or cut a design or letters into
examples: engrave the pen with the owner's name

meanings.definition: selectively dissolve the surface of (a semiconductor or printed circuit) with a solvent, laser, or stream of electrons
